title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers bilingual homeownership counseling for first-time homebuyers, as well as those facing foreclosure. Also offers a HUD-certified homebuying course and access to down payment assistance options when available. 6700 NE Killingsworth Street Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 961-6432 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 961-6432 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Attend a Camino a Casa orientation course. Call or visit website for more information. FEES: $75 for non-clients DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of NE Killingsworth Street and NE Cully Boulevard Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - EMPRESARIOS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SEMBRANDO SEMILLITAS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HACIENDA COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION
